posts.author: Dan123 (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to enrich my existing leads with additional data. However when I tried importing a CSV and mapping using email there is no such functionality in Monday CRM. This feature exists in Monday Work Management.

Exporting the board to a Spreadsheet and then re-import with overwrite after enriching the spreadsheet does not work since the board has more than 50 columns.

Can someone please give a suggestion on how I can accomplish this in Monday CRM?

Thanks.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?
